tool_input.summary: Identified Spirit (MER-2) in-situ datasets in the PDS Geosciences (and related) archives that contain the compositional, mineralogical, and imaging observations used to argue for co-located fumarolic (acid-sulfate, steam-heated) and hot-spring (silica-sinter) activity in the same volcanic hydrothermal system at Gusev/Columbia Hills (e.g., Home Plate area).

candidates.title: MER2 Mini-TES Calibrated Radiance Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Mini-TES spectra are the key Spirit dataset for identifying opaline silica vs sulfate/alteration mineralogy consistent with hot-spring sinter and fumarolic/steam-heated alteration.

candidates.title: MER2 Mini-TES Derived Emissivity Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Derived emissivity products facilitate mineral identification (e.g., silica-rich phases) that underpin the hot-spring component of the hydrothermal-system interpretation.

candidates.title: Ruff PDART 2014 Mini-TES Mirror-dust-corrected Emissivity Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Provides mirror-dust-corrected Mini-TES emissivity specifically intended to improve mineral detections relevant to hydrothermal interpretations at Spirit sites.

candidates.title: MER2 APXS Xray Spectra (Partially Processed) Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: APXS bulk chemistry constrains silica enrichment and sulfur/salt enrichments used to distinguish silica sinter/hot-spring deposition from acid-sulfate fumarolic leaching and sulfate deposition.

candidates.title: MER APXS Derived Oxide Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Derived oxide abundances make it straightforward to compare SiO2 vs SO3 and other oxides across Spirit targets when testing linked fumarolic and hot-spring alteration styles.

candidates.title: MER2 MB Summed Spectra Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Mössbauer summed spectra constrain Fe mineralogy/oxidation state (e.g., ferric phases associated with acid-sulfate/steam-heated alteration) to complement the silica vs sulfate story.

candidates.title: MER MB Relative Iron Abundance Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Derived relative Fe abundances help map alteration trends and link iron mineral assemblages with either fumarolic or hot-spring settings at Spirit sites.

candidates.title: MER2 Pancam Science Calibrated Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Pancam multispectral calibrated imaging supports geomorphic/stratigraphic context and color/spectral clues for altered deposits (silica-rich vs sulfate-rich units).

candidates.title: MER2 Microscopic Imager Science Calibrated Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: MI textures at mm scale can distinguish precipitated crusts/sinter-like fabrics from leached/altered tephra or cemented sulfate-rich materials.

candidates.title: Mars Exploration Rover (MER) Documentation Bundle
